about: Suggest a new capability or UX improvement.
labels: enhancement

## Use case

<!-- What are you trying to do?  What can you not do today, or what
     takes too many steps? -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What would you like to happen?  If you have a sketch of how the
     UI / command / config would look, include it. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What workaround or related feature did you try first?  Why
     wasn't it enough? -->

## Out of scope

<!-- What's NOT being asked for here?  Helps keep the design tight. -->
